sources.notes: GeoSphere Austria dataset API catalogue (INCA nowcast, SPARTACUS, climate stations, air-quality/chem forecasts). Returns 200. Individual timeseries/grid queries require station or geometry parameters; dataset IDs such as nowcast-v1-15min-1km, klima-v2-10min and chem_aqi-v1-1d-3km are listed here.

Current earthquakes map and list for Austria (and Europe/world) covering the last 14 days, with origin time, magnitude, depth, epicentre and felt reports. Endpoint reachable (302 redirect to HTTPS SPA). Catalogue queries available on request from the Earthquake Service.
Avalanche bulletin for the state of Salzburg including weather station data, snow profiles and avalanche incidents. Returns 200.

European Avalanche Warning Services (EAWS) bulletin portal covering Tyrol, Carinthia, Salzburg, Styria, Vorarlberg and South Tyrol. The /api/bulletins endpoint requires params (400 without); the portal root returns 200. Bulletins also available as GeoJSON via the EAWS common format.

Austrian Environment Agency air-quality information (ozone, PM, NO2 monitoring). Root page returns 200. Air-quality measurement data is published via the Austrian air-quality network and the European Environment Agency Air Quality e-reporting/Discomap services.

APG market transparency data: actual total load, load forecast, capacity margin and consumption-unit unavailabilities for the Austrian control area, per EU Transparency Regulation 543/2013. A free public REST API is available on request (registration required) — hence api-key. All data is also mirrored on the ENTSO-E Transparency Platform.
